scope: pnpm coverage root script and scripts/run-coverage.mjs
Node native coverage artifacts coverage/coverage-summary.json and coverage/lcov.info
quality-gate coverage step and required coverage ratchet
docs/testing.md README and execution-plan updates for public-safe coverage guidance
residualRisk: Approved with risk: the independent reviewer found the initial untracked script and coverage-minimum bootstrap findings, both corrected. Deterministic command-injection is accepted because the runner uses spawnSync without shell and static commands. Debug logs are intentional command/progress output. Magic strings and numbers are lcov format tokens and coverage percentage defaults. no-test-file-changed is accepted because pnpm coverage exercised the new runner with 55 tests against real local Postgres. package-manifest-without-lockfile is accepted because package.json adds only a script and no dependency. Remaining risk: actionlint is not installed locally, so workflow syntax is ultimately verified by GitHub Actions.
